signals.headline: Bitcoin Hits Record High Over $118,000 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Hits Record High Over $118,000 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin surged to back-to-back record highs of $112,000 on Thursday and $118,000 on Friday, triggering $1.1 billion in short liquidations and fueling a broader crypto rally.[3]

signals.headline: XRP Hits 4-Month High of $2
signals.raw:
XRP Hits 4-Month High of $2.90 Amid Bitcoin Rally | YES | HIGH confidence**  
XRP rallied over 12% to $2.90 (trading at $2.80), leading altcoin gains and hitting its highest since early 2026, driven by Bitcoin's surge and Ripple's announcement of Bank of New York Mellon as custodian for its RLUSD stablecoin.[3] Retail sentiment on Stocktwits reached 'extremely bullish,' with speculation on breakin
